overview.description: The REX-Osprey SOL + Staking ETF (SSK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long sol, short usd currency. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides exposure to the price performance of spot Solana (SOL) along with an additional layer of potential return via staking rewards, which are passed on to investors through monthly payouts. SSK was launched on Jul 2, 2025 and is issued by REX-Osprey.
